jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at upGrad
jsonLd.description:
upGrad, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About upGrad:
upGrad is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with upGrad!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
